title: [Arc] Add trace encoding infrastructure to ArcRuntime
body: This PR adds the fundamental interface and infrastructure to the ArcRuntime to feed signal trace data produced by the IR model to a separate encoder thread using zero copy buffers. It adds the abstract `TraceEncoder` class implementing the buffer and thread management logic, which concrete encoder backends, (e.g., VCD, FST or a CXXRTL server database) can inherit. On the IR side, it adds the necessary fields to the runtime API structs and the `arcRuntimeIR_swapTraceBuffer` function, allowing the model to request a new raw trace buffer when the current one has reached its limit.
